claims.claim: `BRIDGE_RECIPROCITY_STALE_WINDOW_MS` can misread meaningful reflective silence as stale unless deep quiet has a state-aware extension.
claims.rationale: Existing `bridge_dynamic_stale_window_ms` and `reflective_silence_extension_ms` already extend the stale window for high-entropy pressure and low-porosity reflective silence.

claims.claim: Mode-packing below the porosity threshold can still contain interwoven complexity, so pressure trends need a complexity-density readout rather than only volume pressure.
claims.rationale: Added read-only `complexity_density` and `complexity_density_state` diagnostics to pressure trend and smoothing surfaces without changing thresholds, pressure, porosity, or control behavior.

claims.claim: `PRESSURE_POROSITY_EXPANSION_MODE_PACKING_AT` might need a lower or entropy-dynamic threshold for dense interwoven states.
claims.rationale: Changing the mode-packing porosity threshold would alter live pressure/porosity interpretation and should require explicit Mike/operator approval plus bridge restart/monitoring.

claims.claim: `semantic_trickle` may need granularity modulation so quiet, meaningful flow is distinguished from volume or silence.
claims.rationale: Changing semantic-trickle granularity would affect live bridge protocol/status interpretation and possibly peer-facing cadence, so it remains gated pending approval.
